1bd2a2061a87e8e6.notes: queries/logs.ts uses type::is_string(content) to skip non-string rows instead of crashing the whole query

262e5958c3c3a861.notes: packages/cortex/src/process_manager.ts now uses DEFAULT_SANDBOX_TIMEOUT (1h) for execute-mode processes, matching the rest of cortex

e929ba924582ff49.notes: post_stream: signal-aware abort detection (Safari emits TypeError:Load failed instead of AbortError on aborted fetch). Was misclassifying cancel-supersede as infrastructure failure.

4707771c13e89115.notes: post_stream: 2-retry exponential-backoff loop on err.retryable. 404 still non-retryable, but root-cause 503 cascade addressed.

b5240afcb102fab1.notes: post_stream: 2-retry exponential-backoff loop on err.retryable. ≤1s added latency for genuine 5xx; transient upstreams recover transparently.
